titleStmt.title: SII 39.31: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 31. (A.R. No. 31 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN[KU]LASĒKHA[RADĒVA], WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL COUNTRIES, 6th year (1274 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of land as tax-free kārāṇmai by the nāṭṭavar of Muṭṭa-nāḍu to the Nāyaṉār at Tiruvādavūr for the supply of food offerings by the Nāṭṭavar of Tiruttiyūmuṭṭanāḍu during the Tirumārgaḻi festival. Also mentions that some amount of rice to be provided to the Brāhmiṉ Sundarapāṇḍyabhaṭṭan, who recited mantra to awaken the lord (Nāyaṉār), besides supplying rice to the people lived in the area of thirty circles (Muppaduvaṭṭam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mat kittikku mel komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekara Āḷun tiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu paurṇaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ tiruttiyūr muṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tirucca muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilila śrī mākeccura
cikāriyañceyvārka ruttiyūrmuṭṭa nāṭṭu mainta nāṭṭavarom piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭutta pāricāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉār � ntara pāṇṭiya paṭṭaṉeṟiyaruḷap paṇṇiṉa tiruvātavūr nāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi veṇṭum nimantattukkum tirumārkaḻit tiru ttukkum nāṅkaḷ puravilkkaḻittu ṟayiliyāka nirvā
ttuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu ṉāyaṉār kaṭamai Iva �ṉ Ivvūr kaṭampaṅkuḷattu naṭuvil maṭaiyāl nirpāvum paṭai pala vayakkal taṭi Oṉṟum perumā caṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa koṭṭaic ceyyāṉa Āvuṭaiyāṉ vayakkal taṭi Oṉṟum piṭā p peruṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷuṭṭār pa l vilai koṇṭa va
ṇṇāṉ cey taṭi Oṉṟum Ayvaṉ cey Iraṇṭum caṉṉaṉ Uṭaiya nāyaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa ṟccurukkamuṭpaṭa nāṭṭaḷavu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl Aḷavu nilam Oru māvukkum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum nāṭiñca mariyāti cai veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa I
ṟaikaḷum tavirttu Iṟaiyili kārāṇmaiyāka kuṭuttom Iṉṉilattāluḷḷa ciripaṇṭāra mutaluḷḷatu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Iṉṉāḷ mutal pala kaittalaiyilo viñcaṉattukku Iru nāḻi nellum viṭṭu Amutu ceytaruḷuvārākavum Amutu ceytu pi(ra)cātam Iṉṉāyanāṉārai Eḻuntaruḷa paṇṇiṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyapaṭṭaṉukku Irunāḻi Ariciccōṟu peruvāṉākavum muppatu vaṭṭattār Irunāḻi Aricic coṟu peṟuvārkaḷākavum nikkiyuḷḷa mutal koṇ
ṭu tirumārkaḻit tirunāḷukku ttār kuṭṭattukku cilavāvatākavum Ippaṭikku meṉokkiya maramum kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpa cuvākantariyaṅkaḷum cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷa piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttom tiruttiyūrmuṭṭa nāṭṭukku camainta nāṭṭavarom tiruvātavūr nāyaṉāṟku Ippaṭikku nāṭṭukku camaintu nāṭṭu kaṇakku tirunākicuramuṭaiyār Eḻuttu
Itu māheśvarar rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
